description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: The parameters for the scheduled Spell to be canceled, as specified in [A.1.

.5.3.1.3 - Protego Parameters](55195cdc-90c3-4133-a0e4-792444b60ed8), should always be determined by inspecting the logs emitted from the `plot` function of the Pause contract. The parameters should never be determined by calling functions on the Spell to be canceled, because these functions may not return the correct values in the case of a malicious Spell.
